title: Validation rejects with 422, spec how_to_verify names 400
evidence: app.py:53-56 Pydantic Field(min_length=1) -> FastAPI returns 422; tests/test_app.py:70-83 assert 422
suggestion: Acceptable (422 is FastAPI's idiomatic validation code); note only for cross-run consistency.

title: No dependency manifest (requirements.txt / pyproject.toml)
evidence: run_dir has no requirements.txt or pyproject.toml; deps listed only prose-style in README.md:25-27
suggestion: Add a requirements.txt pinning fastapi, uvicorn, pydantic, pytest, httpx for reproducible installs.
